title: Portable Shared Memory Parallel Programming Workflow
description: A flowchart showing the process of creating a portable parallel application using shared memory programming models like OpenMP, from code creation to execution across different platforms.
elements: Developer writes parallel code (e.g., with OpenMP pragmas)
relationships: Code is compiled by the portable compiler
Compiler generates executable linked with runtime library
Runtime library manages threads and memory access at execution
Executable runs on shared memory hardware
Same source code can be compiled for different platforms
